name: IBIF v2 - roads - biodiversity intactness - vertebrates
description: Intactness-based Biodiversity Impact Factors (IBIF) for road infrastructure impacts on terrestrial biodiversity intactness, (vertebrates). Targets technosphere road suppliers with unit meter-year. Based on GLOBIO 4 model and Mean Species Abundance (MSA) metric. Original units MSA-loss.km2/km converted to MSA-loss.km2/m to match ecoinvent road infrastructure flows (meter-year). From Schipper et al. 2025: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-05946-1. Country-level entries include a GDP-based weight used to compute weighted averages when aggregating to composite or unspecified regions.
